name: Fire Hose Box — Wall Mounted
shortDescription: Weatherproof cabinet housing the hose, branch pipe and coupling at each hydrant point.
longDescription: Every hydrant landing valve needs its hose, branch pipe and coupling spanner stored right beside it, protected from dust and weather but instantly accessible in an emergency. This mild steel hose box is fabricated to take a standard 15 m or 30 m RRL hose along with its branch pipe, with a glass-fronted or louvred door so the contents can be checked at a glance during a fire safety audit.

images.alt: Fire Hose Box — Wall Mounted supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Mounting
specs.value: Wall or floor mounted, beside hydrant valve
